props.name: alignment
props.description: Primary axis alignment of child components.

props.name: direction
props.description: Stacking direction of child components.

props.name: gap
props.description: Spacing between items. Uses design system spacing tokens.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the block container.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Sets the minimum width of the block container.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the block container.

props.name: alignment
props.description: Sets the primary axis alignment of child components.

props.name: direction
props.description: Sets the stacking direction of child components.

props.name: gap
props.description: Sets the spacing between items. Uses design system spacing tokens.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the block container.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: minWidth
props.description: Sets the minimum width of the block container.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the block container. Defaults to max-content.
